description: A Phoenix LiveView Toggle Group component.
docs:
Add to the `html_helpers` function in your `my_app_web.ex`:

    import MyAppWeb.Components.UI.ToggleGroup

Replace `MyAppWeb` with your application's module prefix.

files.content:
defmodule MyAppWeb.Components.UI.ToggleGroup do use Phoenix.Component attr :type, :string, default: "single", values: ~w(single multiple) attr :variant, :string, default: "default", values: ~w(default outline) attr :size, :string, default: "default", values: ~w(default sm lg) attr :class, :string, default: nil attr :rest, :global slot :inner_block, required: true def toggle_group(assigns) do ~H"""
{render_slot(@inner_block)}
""" end end

name: toggle-group
title: Toggle Group
